name: Prisoner Incidents
description: Prisoner-level incident reports, available to users with caseload access.

dataset.name: Prisons
dataset.query: select prison_id, name prison_name FROM prisons.prisonregister_prison p where p.active = true order by name

dataset.name: Prisoner Role
dataset.query: SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_prisoner_role order by description

dataset.name: Incident Types
dataset.query: SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type_family order by description

dataset.name: Incident Status
dataset.query: SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_status where code NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT') order by description

dataset.name: Prisoner summary of incidents
dataset.query:
select pi.prisoner_number,
       initcap(pi.first_name) AS first_name,
       initcap(pi.last_name) AS last_name,
       p.prison_id                                                 as location,
       p.name                                                      as prison_name,
       ail.description                                             as cell_location,
       sum(case when ctf.code = 'ASSAULT' then 1 else 0 end)       as assault_count,
       sum(case when ctf.code = 'SELF_HARM' then 1 else 0 end)     as self_harm_count,
       sum(case when ctf.code = 'FIND' then 1 else 0 end)          as finds_count,
       sum(case when ctf.code = 'DISORDER' then 1 else 0 end)      as disorder_count,
       sum(case when ctf.code = 'DRUGS' then 1 else 0 end)         as drugs_count,
       sum(case when ctf.code = 'MISCELLANEOUS' then 1 else 0 end) as misc_count,
       count(*)                                                    as total_incidents
from prisons.nomis_OFFENDER_BOOKINGS ob
         JOIN prisons.nomis_OFFENDERS o
              ON o.OFFENDER_ID = ob.OFFENDER_ID AND ob.BOOKING_SEQ = 1 AND ob.ACTIVE_FLAG = 'Y'
         join prisons.incidentreporting_prisoner_involvement pi on pi.prisoner_number = o.OFFENDER_ID_DISPLAY
         join prisons.nomis_AGENCY_INTERNAL_LOCATIONS ail on ob.LIVING_UNIT_ID = ail.INTERNAL_LOCATION_ID
         join prisons.prisonregister_prison p on p.prison_id = ob.agy_loc_id
         join prisons.incidentreporting_report r on r.id = pi.report_id
         join prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type ct on r.type = ct.code
         join prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type_family ctf on ctf.code = ct.family_code
WHERE r.status NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT')
GROUP BY pi.prisoner_number, pi.last_name, pi.first_name, p.prison_id, p.name, ail.description

dataset.name: Prisoner Involvement in Incidents: Establishment Level
dataset.query:
WITH qa_pivoted AS (
    -- We scan the Q&A tables once and pivot all required answers into a single row per report
    SELECT
        q.report_id,

        -- Assault Subtypes
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('61287', '44367', '61254') THEN
                     CASE res.code
                         WHEN '213115' THEN 'Prisoner on prisoner (PoP)'
                         WHEN '213116' THEN 'Prisoner on staff (PoS)'
                         WHEN '213117' THEN 'Prisoner on other'
                         WHEN '213118' THEN 'Other'
                         WHEN '179730' THEN 'Prisoner on prisoner (PoP)'
                         WHEN '179732' THEN 'Prisoner on staff (PoS)'
                         WHEN '179733' THEN 'Prisoner on other'
                         WHEN '179731' THEN 'Other'
                         WHEN '212909' THEN 'Prisoner on prisoner (PoP)'
                         WHEN '212910' THEN 'Prisoner on staff (PoS)'
                         WHEN '212911' THEN 'Prisoner on other'
                         WHEN '212912' THEN 'Other'
                         END
            END) AS assault_subtype,

        -- Staff assaulted follow-up (ASSAULT_5 Q61288 / ASSAULT_4 Q61255) indicates Prisoner on staff even when the headline answer is not 'Prisoner on staff'
        MAX(CASE WHEN (q.code = '61288' AND res.code = '213120') OR (q.code = '61255' AND res.code = '212914') THEN 'Y' END) AS staff_assaulted,

        -- Disorder Subtypes (DISORDER_2 active + DISORDER_1 legacy)
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('63179', '49179') THEN
                     CASE res.code
                         WHEN '214684' THEN 'Barricade / prevention of access'
                         WHEN '214685' THEN 'Concerted indiscipline'
                         WHEN '214686' THEN 'Hostage'
                         WHEN '214687' THEN 'Incident at height'
                         WHEN '194684' THEN 'Barricade / prevention of access'
                         WHEN '194685' THEN 'Hostage'
                         WHEN '194686' THEN 'Incident at height'
                         WHEN '194687' THEN 'Concerted indiscipline'
                         END
            END) AS disorder_subtype,

        -- Find Categories (Newer Versions)
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('67187', '65187') THEN
                     CASE res.code
                         WHEN '218783' THEN 'Multiple types'
                         WHEN '218784' THEN 'Alcohol / hooch / distilling equipment'
                         WHEN '218785' THEN 'Drug / drug equipment'
                         WHEN '218786' THEN 'Mobile phone / mobile related item'
                         WHEN '218787' THEN 'Digital find (excluding mobile phones)'
                         WHEN '218788' THEN 'Tobacco / tobacco related items'
                         WHEN '218789' THEN 'Weapon'
                         WHEN '218790' THEN 'Other reportable items'
                         WHEN '216784' THEN 'Multiple types'
                         WHEN '216785' THEN 'Alcohol / hooch / distilling equipment'
                         WHEN '216786' THEN 'Drug / drug equipment'
                         WHEN '216787' THEN 'Mobile phone / mobile related item'
                         WHEN '216788' THEN 'Digital find (excluding mobile phones)'
                         WHEN '216789' THEN 'Tobacco / tobacco related items'
                         WHEN '216790' THEN 'Weapon'
                         WHEN '216791' THEN 'Other reportable items'
                         END
            END) AS find_category_new,

        -- Legacy Find Logic Flags
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('49265','51234','51188','57288') AND res.code IN ('195011','198731','196731','209156') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS found_drug,
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('49274','51242','51196','57296') AND res.code IN ('195045','198783','196783','209208') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS found_mobile,
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('49289','51255','51209','57309') AND res.code IN ('195084','198874','196875','209297') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS found_alcohol,

        -- Flags for Assault Details
        MAX(CASE WHEN (q.code = '61298' AND res.code = '213159') OR (q.code = '61265' AND res.code = '212954') OR (q.code = '44773' AND res.code = '181164') THEN 'Y' END) AS is_serious,
        MAX(CASE WHEN (q.code = '61305' AND res.code = '213197') OR (q.code = '61272' AND res.code = '212989') OR (q.code = '44522' AND res.code = '180283') THEN 'Y' END) AS is_concussion,
        MAX(CASE WHEN (q.code = '61285' AND res.code = '213111') OR (q.code = '61252' AND res.code = '212906') OR (q.code = '44586' AND res.code = '180540') THEN 'Y' END) AS is_sexual,
        MAX(CASE WHEN (q.code = '61290' AND res.code = '213126') OR (q.code = '61257' AND res.code = '212920') OR (q.code = '44464' AND res.code = '180077') THEN 'Y' END) AS is_spitting,

        -- Flags for Self-Harm Details
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code = '44753' AND res.code = '181110' THEN 'Y' END) AS is_cutting,
        MAX(CASE WHEN (q.code = '44244' AND res.code = '179302') OR (q.code = '44207' AND res.code = '179187') THEN 'Y' END) AS is_ligature,
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code = '45167' AND res.code = '182616' THEN 'Y' END) AS is_burning,

        -- Text fields
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('61303', '61270') THEN
                     CASE res.code
                         WHEN '213182' THEN 'Accident and Emergency (A&E)'
                         WHEN '213183' THEN 'Inpatient (overnight)'
                         WHEN '213184' THEN 'Inpatient (over 24 hours)'
                         WHEN '213185' THEN 'Life support'
                         WHEN '212976' THEN 'Accident and Emergency (A&E)'
                         WHEN '212977' THEN 'Inpatient (overnight)'
                         WHEN '212978' THEN 'Inpatient (over 24 hours)'
                         WHEN '212979' THEN 'Life support'
                         END
            END) AS hospital_admission_type,
        CAST(LISTAGG(CASE WHEN q.question ILIKE '%APPARENT REASON%' THEN NULLIF(COALESCE(NULLIF(res.additional_information, ''), CASE WHEN UPPER(res.response) NOT IN ('YES','NO') THEN res.label END), '') END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY res.sequence) AS VARCHAR(4000)) AS reason,

        -- FIND_6 Multiple types item detection (Q67205-67225 are exclusive to the Multiple flow)
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code = '67205' AND res.code != '218953' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS f6m_alcohol,
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code = '67207' AND res.code = '218965' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS f6m_drugs,
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code = '67213' AND res.code = '219014' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS f6m_mobile,
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code = '67215' AND res.code != '219038' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS f6m_sim,
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code = '67216' AND res.code != '219061' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS f6m_memory,
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code = '67220' AND res.code != '219091' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS f6m_digital,
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code = '67221' AND res.code = '219106' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS f6m_tobacco,
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code = '67224' AND res.code != '219115' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS f6m_weapon,
        CAST(LISTAGG(CASE
        WHEN q.code IN ('61295','61262','44464','44761','44882','44554','44638','49199') THEN
          CASE res.code
            WHEN '213137' THEN 'Firearm'
            WHEN '213138' THEN 'Chemical incapacitant'
            WHEN '213139' THEN 'Knife/blade'
            WHEN '213140' THEN 'Other sharp instrument'
            WHEN '213141' THEN 'Blunt instrument'
            WHEN '213142' THEN 'Ligature'
            WHEN '213143' THEN 'Dangerous liquid'
            WHEN '213144' THEN 'Excreta/urine'
            WHEN '213145' THEN 'Food'
            WHEN '213146' THEN 'Thrown furniture'
            WHEN '213147' THEN 'Thrown equipment'
            WHEN '213148' THEN 'Other'
            WHEN '212931' THEN 'Blunt instrument'
            WHEN '212932' THEN 'Knife/blade'
            WHEN '212933' THEN 'Other sharp instrument'
            WHEN '212934' THEN 'Dangerous liquid'
            WHEN '212935' THEN 'Excreta/urine'
            WHEN '212936' THEN 'Thrown equipment'
            WHEN '212937' THEN 'Thrown furniture'
            WHEN '212938' THEN 'Food'
            WHEN '212939' THEN 'Ligature'
            WHEN '212940' THEN 'Chemical incapacitant'
            WHEN '212941' THEN 'Firearm'
            WHEN '212942' THEN 'Other'
            WHEN '180071' THEN 'Firearm'
            WHEN '180068' THEN 'Chemical incapacitant'
            WHEN '180073' THEN 'Knife/blade'
            WHEN '180076' THEN 'Other sharp instrument'
            WHEN '180067' THEN 'Blunt instrument'
            WHEN '180074' THEN 'Ligature'
            WHEN '180069' THEN 'Dangerous liquid'
            WHEN '180070' THEN 'Excreta/urine'
            WHEN '180072' THEN 'Food'
            WHEN '180079' THEN 'Thrown furniture'
            WHEN '180078' THEN 'Thrown equipment'
            WHEN '180075' THEN 'Other'
            WHEN '181134' THEN 'Other sharp instrument'
            WHEN '181128' THEN 'Blunt instrument'
            WHEN '181132' THEN 'Ligature'
            WHEN '181129' THEN 'Dangerous liquid'
            WHEN '181130' THEN 'Excreta/urine'
            WHEN '181131' THEN 'Food'
            WHEN '181137' THEN 'Thrown furniture'
            WHEN '181136' THEN 'Thrown equipment'
            WHEN '181133' THEN 'Other'
            WHEN '181526' THEN 'Other sharp instrument'
            WHEN '181520' THEN 'Blunt instrument'
            WHEN '181524' THEN 'Ligature'
            WHEN '181521' THEN 'Dangerous liquid'
            WHEN '181522' THEN 'Excreta/urine'
            WHEN '181523' THEN 'Food'
            WHEN '181529' THEN 'Thrown furniture'
            WHEN '181528' THEN 'Thrown equipment'
            WHEN '181525' THEN 'Other'
            WHEN '180444' THEN 'Firearm'
            WHEN '180441' THEN 'Chemical incapacitant'
            WHEN '180446' THEN 'Knife/blade'
            WHEN '180449' THEN 'Other sharp instrument'
            WHEN '180440' THEN 'Blunt instrument'
            WHEN '180447' THEN 'Ligature'
            WHEN '180442' THEN 'Dangerous liquid'
            WHEN '180443' THEN 'Excreta/urine'
            WHEN '180445' THEN 'Food'
            WHEN '180452' THEN 'Thrown furniture'
            WHEN '180451' THEN 'Thrown equipment'
            WHEN '180448' THEN 'Other'
            WHEN '180721' THEN 'Other sharp instrument'
            WHEN '180715' THEN 'Blunt instrument'
            WHEN '180719' THEN 'Ligature'
            WHEN '180716' THEN 'Dangerous liquid'
            WHEN '180717' THEN 'Excreta/urine'
            WHEN '180718' THEN 'Food'
            WHEN '180724' THEN 'Thrown furniture'
            WHEN '180723' THEN 'Thrown equipment'
            WHEN '180720' THEN 'Other'
            WHEN '194793' THEN 'Blunt instrument'
            WHEN '194794' THEN 'Chemical incapacitant'
            WHEN '194795' THEN 'Dangerous liquid'
            WHEN '194796' THEN 'Excreta/urine'
            WHEN '194797' THEN 'Firearm'
            WHEN '194798' THEN 'Food'
            WHEN '194799' THEN 'Knife/blade'
            WHEN '194800' THEN 'Ligature'
            WHEN '194801' THEN 'Other'
            WHEN '194802' THEN 'Other sharp instrument'
            WHEN '194804' THEN 'Thrown equipment'
            WHEN '194805' THEN 'Thrown furniture'
          END
        WHEN q.code = '63198' AND res.code = '214802' THEN 'Weapon used'
        END, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY res.sequence) AS VARCHAR(4000)) AS weapon_types,
        -- Incident location (where it took place) — covers active types + ASSAULT_1 legacy
        MAX(CASE WHEN q.code IN ('61284', '45134', '45051', '67181', '63182', '49182', '44194', '100000', '44366', '44751', '44717', '45112', '45032', '44496', '44594', '44946', '45178', '45180', '44532', '44463', '44304', '44927') THEN
            CASE res.code
                -- ASSAULT_5 Q61284
                WHEN '213074' THEN 'Administration'
                WHEN '213075' THEN 'Association area' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '213076' THEN 'Cell' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '213077' THEN 'Chapel'
                WHEN '213078' THEN 'Dining room'
                WHEN '213079' THEN 'Dormitory'
                WHEN '213080' THEN 'Education'
                WHEN '213081' THEN 'Exercise yard'
                WHEN '213082' THEN 'Gate'
                WHEN '213083' THEN 'Gym'
                WHEN '213084' THEN 'Health care centre'
                WHEN '213085' THEN 'Kitchen'
                WHEN '213086' THEN 'Office'
                WHEN '213087' THEN 'Reception'

                WHEN '213091' THEN 'Showers/changing room'
                WHEN '213092' THEN 'Visits'
                WHEN '213093' THEN 'Wing' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '213094' THEN 'Works department'
                WHEN '213095' THEN 'Workshop' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '213096' THEN 'Within perimeter' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '213097' THEN 'Elsewhere' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '213098' THEN 'Funeral'
                WHEN '213099' THEN 'Hospital outside (patient)'
                WHEN '213100' THEN 'Hospital outside (visiting)'
                WHEN '213101' THEN 'Outside working party' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '213102' THEN 'Sports field'
                WHEN '213103' THEN 'Vehicle'
                WHEN '213104' THEN 'Weddings'
                WHEN '213105' THEN 'Magistrates court' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '213106' THEN 'Crown court' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '213107' THEN 'Induction/first night centre' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '213108' THEN 'Mail room'
                WHEN '213109' THEN 'Vulnerable prisoners unit (VPU)' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '213110' THEN 'External roof' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                -- ASSAULT_1 Q45134 (no comments on any response)
                WHEN '182475' THEN 'Administration'
                WHEN '182476' THEN 'Association area'
                WHEN '182477' THEN 'Cell'
                WHEN '182478' THEN 'Chapel'
                WHEN '182479' THEN 'Crown court'
                WHEN '182480' THEN 'Dining room'
                WHEN '182481' THEN 'Dormitory'
                WHEN '182482' THEN 'Education'

                -- SELF_HARM_1 Q45051 (all have mandatory comment)
                WHEN '182175' THEN 'Court cell' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '182176' THEN 'Detox unit' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '182177' THEN 'Health care centre' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '182178' THEN 'Indct''n/recp''n/1st nightcentre' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '182179' THEN 'Ordinary' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')

                -- FIND_6 Q67181
                WHEN '218712' THEN 'Administration'
                WHEN '218713' THEN 'Association area' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '218714' THEN 'Cell' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '218715' THEN 'Chapel'

                WHEN '218726' THEN 'Induction/first night centre'
                WHEN '218727' THEN 'Kitchen'

                WHEN '218733' THEN 'Segregation unit' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '218734' THEN 'Showers/changing room' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '218735' THEN 'Vehicle used for court/transfer'
                WHEN '218736' THEN 'Visits'
                WHEN '218737' THEN 'Vulnerable prisoners unit (VPU)' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '218738' THEN 'Wing' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '218739' THEN 'Workshop' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '218740' THEN 'Other' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                -- DISORDER_2 Q63182 (all no comment except 214729)
                WHEN '214694' THEN 'Administration'
                WHEN '214695' THEN 'Association area'
                WHEN '214696' THEN 'Cell'
                WHEN '214697' THEN 'Chapel'

                WHEN '214699' THEN 'Dining room'

                WHEN '214702' THEN 'Exercise yard'
                WHEN '214703' THEN 'External roof'
                WHEN '214704' THEN 'Funeral'
                WHEN '214705' THEN 'Gate'
                WHEN '214706' THEN 'Gym'
                WHEN '214707' THEN 'Health care centre'
                WHEN '214708' THEN 'Hospital outside (patient)'
                WHEN '214709' THEN 'Hospital outside (visiting)'
                WHEN '214710' THEN 'Induction/1st night centre'
                WHEN '214711' THEN 'Kitchen'
                WHEN '214712' THEN 'Magistrates court'
                WHEN '214713' THEN 'Office'
                WHEN '214714' THEN 'Outside working party'
                WHEN '214715' THEN 'Reception'
                WHEN '214716' THEN 'Recess'
                WHEN '214717' THEN 'Segregation unit'
                WHEN '214718' THEN 'Showers/changing room'
                WHEN '214719' THEN 'Special unit'
                WHEN '214720' THEN 'Sports field'
                WHEN '214721' THEN 'Vehicle'
                WHEN '214722' THEN 'Visits'
                WHEN '214723' THEN 'Vulnerable prisoners unit'
                WHEN '214724' THEN 'Weddings'
                WHEN '214725' THEN 'Wing'
                WHEN '214726' THEN 'Within perimeter'
                WHEN '214727' THEN 'Works department'
                WHEN '214728' THEN 'Workshop'
                WHEN '214729' THEN 'Other' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                -- DISORDER_1 Q49182 (inactive, no comment except 194703)
                WHEN '194695' THEN 'Administration'
                WHEN '194696' THEN 'Association area'

                WHEN '194720' THEN 'Sports field'
                WHEN '194721' THEN 'Vehicle'
                WHEN '194722' THEN 'Visits'

                WHEN '194726' THEN 'Works department'
                WHEN '194727' THEN 'Workshop'
                WHEN '194728' THEN 'Induction/1st night centre'

                WHEN '194730' THEN 'Vulnerable prisoners unit'
                -- FIRE_1 Q44194

                WHEN '179123' THEN 'Cell' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '179124' THEN 'Chapel'

                WHEN '100005' THEN 'Crown/magistrates court'

                WHEN '100007' THEN 'Vehicle' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                -- DEATH_PRISONER_1 Q44366
                WHEN '179724' THEN 'Single cell: ordinary location'
                WHEN '179725' THEN 'Single cell: segregation unit'
                WHEN '179723' THEN 'Shared cell: ordinary location'

                WHEN '180996' THEN 'Unsupervised outside party'

                -- ESCAPE_FROM_ESCORT_1 Q45112
                WHEN '182389' THEN 'Vehicle en route to venue'
                WHEN '182388' THEN 'Vehicle en route from venue'

                WHEN '182386' THEN 'Entering vehicle (embussing)'

                -- ESCAPE_FROM_PRISON_1 Q45032

                WHEN '180581' THEN 'Grounds with no access to external perimeter'
                WHEN '180580' THEN 'Grounds with access to external perimeter'
                -- BREACH_OF_SECURITY_1 Q44946
                WHEN '181777' THEN 'Inside prison' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '181778' THEN 'Outside prison'
                -- BOMB_1 Q45178
                WHEN '182651' THEN 'Administration'
                WHEN '182652' THEN 'Association area'
                WHEN '182653' THEN 'Cell'

                WHEN '182660' THEN 'Exercise yard'

                WHEN '182662' THEN 'Gate'
                WHEN '182663' THEN 'Gym'
                WHEN '182664' THEN 'Health care centre'

                WHEN '182674' THEN 'Showers/changing room'
                WHEN '182675' THEN 'Special unit'
                WHEN '182676' THEN 'Sports field'
                WHEN '182677' THEN 'Vehicle'
                WHEN '182678' THEN 'Visits'
                WHEN '182679' THEN 'Weddings'
                WHEN '182680' THEN 'Wing'
                WHEN '182681' THEN 'Within perimeter'
                WHEN '182682' THEN 'Works department'
                WHEN '182683' THEN 'Workshop'
                -- RELEASE_IN_ERROR_1 Q45180 (multipleAnswers, all mandatory comment)
                WHEN '183026' THEN 'Establishment' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '183027' THEN 'Court' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '183028' THEN 'Other' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                -- BARRICADE_1 Q44532 (inactive type, legacy)
                WHEN '180354' THEN 'Administration'
                WHEN '180355' THEN 'Association area'
                WHEN '180356' THEN 'Cell'
                WHEN '180357' THEN 'Chapel'
                WHEN '180358' THEN 'Crown court'

                WHEN '180360' THEN 'Dormitory'

                WHEN '180365' THEN 'Gate'

                WHEN '180368' THEN 'Hospital outside (patient)'

                WHEN '180370' THEN 'Kitchen'
                WHEN '180371' THEN 'Magistrates court'
                WHEN '180372' THEN 'Office'
                WHEN '180373' THEN 'Outside working party'
                WHEN '180374' THEN 'Reception'

                WHEN '180376' THEN 'Segregation unit'
                WHEN '180377' THEN 'Showers/changing room'
                WHEN '180378' THEN 'Special unit'
                WHEN '180379' THEN 'Sports field'
                WHEN '180380' THEN 'Vehicle'
                WHEN '180381' THEN 'Visits'
                WHEN '180382' THEN 'Weddings'
                WHEN '180383' THEN 'Wing'
                WHEN '180384' THEN 'Within perimeter'
                WHEN '180385' THEN 'Works department'
                WHEN '180386' THEN 'Workshop'
                -- HOSTAGE_1 Q44463 (inactive type, legacy)
                WHEN '180034' THEN 'Administration'
                WHEN '180035' THEN 'Association area'
                WHEN '180036' THEN 'Cell'
                WHEN '180037' THEN 'Chapel'
                WHEN '180038' THEN 'Crown court'
                WHEN '180039' THEN 'Dining room'
                WHEN '180040' THEN 'Dormitory'
                WHEN '180041' THEN 'Education'
                WHEN '180042' THEN 'Elsewhere' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '180043' THEN 'Exercise yard'
                WHEN '180044' THEN 'Funeral'
                WHEN '180045' THEN 'Gate'
                WHEN '180046' THEN 'Gym'
                WHEN '180047' THEN 'Health care centre'
                WHEN '180048' THEN 'Hospital outside (patient)'
                WHEN '180049' THEN 'Hospital outside (visiting)'
                WHEN '180050' THEN 'Kitchen'
                WHEN '180051' THEN 'Magistrates court'
                WHEN '180052' THEN 'Office'
                WHEN '180053' THEN 'Outside working party'
                WHEN '180054' THEN 'Reception'
                WHEN '180055' THEN 'Recess'
                WHEN '180056' THEN 'Segregation unit'
                WHEN '180057' THEN 'Showers/changing room'
                WHEN '180058' THEN 'Special unit'
                WHEN '180059' THEN 'Sports field'
                WHEN '180060' THEN 'Vehicle'
                WHEN '180061' THEN 'Visits'
                WHEN '180062' THEN 'Weddings'
                WHEN '180063' THEN 'Wing'
                WHEN '180064' THEN 'Within perimeter'
                WHEN '180065' THEN 'Works department'
                WHEN '180066' THEN 'Workshop'
                -- CONCERTED_INDISCIPLINE_1 Q44304 (inactive type, legacy)
                WHEN '179481' THEN 'Administration'
                WHEN '179482' THEN 'Association area'
                WHEN '179483' THEN 'Cell'
                WHEN '179484' THEN 'Chapel'
                WHEN '179485' THEN 'Crown court'
                WHEN '179486' THEN 'Dining room'
                WHEN '179487' THEN 'Dormitory'
                WHEN '179488' THEN 'Education'
                WHEN '179489' THEN 'Elsewhere' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '179490' THEN 'Exercise yard'
                WHEN '179491' THEN 'Funeral'
                WHEN '179492' THEN 'Gate'
                WHEN '179493' THEN 'Gym'
                WHEN '179494' THEN 'Health care centre'
                WHEN '179495' THEN 'Hospital outside (patient)'
                WHEN '179496' THEN 'Hospital outside (visiting)'
                WHEN '179497' THEN 'Kitchen'
                WHEN '179498' THEN 'Magistrates court'
                WHEN '179499' THEN 'Office'
                WHEN '179500' THEN 'Outside working party'
                WHEN '179501' THEN 'Reception'
                WHEN '179502' THEN 'Recess'
                WHEN '179503' THEN 'Segregation unit'
                WHEN '179504' THEN 'Showers/changing room'
                WHEN '179505' THEN 'Special unit'
                WHEN '179506' THEN 'Sports field'
                WHEN '179507' THEN 'Vehicle'
                WHEN '179508' THEN 'Visits'
                WHEN '179509' THEN 'Weddings'
                WHEN '179510' THEN 'Wing'
                WHEN '179511' THEN 'Within perimeter'
                WHEN '179512' THEN 'Works department'
                WHEN '179513' THEN 'Workshop'
                -- INCIDENT_AT_HEIGHT_1 Q44927 (inactive type, legacy)
                WHEN '181684' THEN 'Administration'
                WHEN '181685' THEN 'Association area'
                WHEN '181686' THEN 'Cell'
                WHEN '181687' THEN 'Chapel'
                WHEN '181688' THEN 'Crown court'
                WHEN '181689' THEN 'Dining room'
                WHEN '181690' THEN 'Dormitory'
                WHEN '181691' THEN 'Education'
                WHEN '181692' THEN 'Elsewhere' || COALESCE(' (' || NULLIF(res.additional_information, '') || ')', '')
                WHEN '181693' THEN 'Exercise yard'
                WHEN '181694' THEN 'Funeral'
                WHEN '181695' THEN 'Gate'
                WHEN '181696' THEN 'Gym'
                WHEN '181697' THEN 'Health care centre'
                WHEN '181698' THEN 'Hospital outside (patient)'
                WHEN '181699' THEN 'Hospital outside (visiting)'
                WHEN '181700' THEN 'Kitchen'
                WHEN '181701' THEN 'Magistrates court'
                WHEN '181702' THEN 'Office'
                WHEN '181703' THEN 'Outside working party'
                WHEN '181704' THEN 'Reception'
                WHEN '181705' THEN 'Recess'
                WHEN '181706' THEN 'Segregation unit'
                WHEN '181707' THEN 'Showers/changing room'
                WHEN '181708' THEN 'Special unit'
                WHEN '181709' THEN 'Sports field'
                WHEN '181710' THEN 'Vehicle'
                WHEN '181711' THEN 'Visits'
                WHEN '181712' THEN 'Weddings'
                WHEN '181713' THEN 'Wing'
                WHEN '181714' THEN 'Within perimeter'
                WHEN '181715' THEN 'Works department'
                WHEN '181716' THEN 'Workshop'
            END
        END) AS incident_location

    FROM prisons.incidentreporting_question q
             JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_response res ON res.question_id = q.id
    GROUP BY 1
)

SELECT
    r.id,
    r.report_reference,
    r.location,
    p.name AS location_name,
    ctf.code AS type,
    ct.description AS type_description,

    -- incident_subtype logic refactored
    CASE
        WHEN ctf.code = 'ASSAULT' THEN NULLIF(REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(qa.assault_subtype || ', ', '') || CASE WHEN qa.staff_assaulted = 'Y' AND COALESCE(qa.assault_subtype, '') <> 'Prisoner on staff (PoS)' THEN 'Prisoner on staff (PoS)' ELSE '' END, ',\\s*$', ''), '')
        WHEN ctf.code = 'BARRICADE' THEN 'Barricade'
        WHEN ctf.code = 'CONCERTED_INDISCIPLINE' THEN 'Concerted Indiscipline'
        WHEN ctf.code = 'HOSTAGE' THEN 'Hostage'
        WHEN ctf.code = 'INCIDENT_AT_HEIGHT' THEN 'Incident at Height'
        WHEN ctf.code = 'DISORDER' THEN qa.disorder_subtype
        WHEN ctf.code = 'FIND' THEN
            COALESCE(qa.find_category_new,
                     CASE
                         WHEN (qa.found_drug + qa.found_mobile + qa.found_alcohol) > 1 THEN 'Multiple types'
                         WHEN qa.found_drug = 1 THEN 'Drug / drug equipment'
                         WHEN qa.found_mobile = 1 THEN 'Mobile phone / mobile related item'
                         WHEN qa.found_alcohol = 1 THEN 'Alcohol / hooch / distilling equipment'
                         END
            )
        END AS incident_subtype,

    r.status,
    cs.description AS status_description,
    r.incident_date_and_time,
    r.reported_by,
    INITCAP(pi.first_name) AS first_name,
    INITCAP(pi.last_name) AS last_name,
    pi.prisoner_number,
    cpr.description AS prisoner_role,
    pi.comment AS prisoner_comment,

    -- Assault Extra Info
    CASE WHEN ctf.code = 'ASSAULT' THEN COALESCE(qa.is_serious, 'N') END AS serious_injury,
    CASE WHEN ctf.code = 'ASSAULT' THEN COALESCE(qa.is_concussion, 'N') END AS concussion_treatment,
    qa.hospital_admission_type,
    CASE WHEN ctf.code = 'ASSAULT' THEN CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.is_serious, 'N') = 'Y' OR COALESCE(qa.is_concussion, 'N') = 'Y' OR qa.hospital_admission_type IN ('Inpatient (overnight)', 'Inpatient (over 24 hours)', 'Life support') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END END AS serious_assault,
    CASE WHEN ctf.code IN ('ASSAULT', 'DISORDER', 'ESCAPE_FROM_PRISON', 'ESCAPE_FROM_ESCORT', 'ATTEMPTED_ESCAPE_FROM_PRISON', 'ATTEMPTED_ESCAPE_FROM_ESCORT') THEN qa.weapon_types END AS weapon_type,
    CASE WHEN ctf.code = 'ASSAULT' THEN COALESCE(qa.is_sexual, 'N') END AS sexual_assault,
    CASE WHEN ctf.code = 'ASSAULT' THEN COALESCE(qa.is_spitting, 'N') END AS spitting,
    qa.reason,

    -- Self-Harm Extra Info
    CASE WHEN ctf.code = 'SELF_HARM' THEN COALESCE(qa.is_cutting, 'N') END AS cutting,
    CASE WHEN ctf.code = 'SELF_HARM' THEN COALESCE(qa.is_ligature, 'N') END AS strangulation_or_hanging,
    CASE WHEN ctf.code = 'SELF_HARM' THEN COALESCE(qa.is_burning, 'N') END AS burning,

    -- Finds Extra Info
    CASE WHEN ctf.code = 'FIND' THEN
        NULLIF(REGEXP_REPLACE(
            CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.f6m_alcohol, 0) = 1 OR COALESCE(qa.found_alcohol, 0) = 1 THEN 'Alcohol, ' ELSE '' END ||
            CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.f6m_drugs, 0) = 1 OR COALESCE(qa.found_drug, 0) = 1 THEN 'Drugs, ' ELSE '' END ||
            CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.f6m_mobile, 0) = 1 OR COALESCE(qa.found_mobile, 0) = 1 THEN 'Mobile phone, ' ELSE '' END ||
            CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.f6m_sim, 0) = 1 THEN 'SIM card, ' ELSE '' END ||
            CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.f6m_memory, 0) = 1 THEN 'Memory card, ' ELSE '' END ||
            CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.f6m_digital, 0) = 1 THEN 'Digital, ' ELSE '' END ||
            CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.f6m_tobacco, 0) = 1 THEN 'Tobacco, ' ELSE '' END ||
            CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.f6m_weapon, 0) = 1 THEN 'Weapon, ' ELSE '' END
        , ',\\s*$', ''), '')
    END AS finds_detail,

    qa.incident_location,
    -- Incident summary: key facts for the incident type in plain words
    CASE
        WHEN ctf.code = 'ASSAULT' THEN
            NULLIF(REGEXP_REPLACE(
                CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.is_serious, 'N') = 'Y' OR COALESCE(qa.is_concussion, 'N') = 'Y' OR qa.hospital_admission_type IN ('Inpatient (overnight)', 'Inpatient (over 24 hours)', 'Life support') THEN 'Serious assault, ' ELSE '' END ||
                CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.is_sexual, 'N') = 'Y' THEN 'Sexual assault, ' ELSE '' END ||
                CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.is_spitting, 'N') = 'Y' THEN 'Spitting, ' ELSE '' END ||
                CASE WHEN qa.weapon_types IS NOT NULL THEN 'Weapon used, ' ELSE '' END
            , ',\\s*$', ''), '')
        WHEN ctf.code = 'SELF_HARM' THEN
            NULLIF(REGEXP_REPLACE(
                CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.is_cutting, 'N') = 'Y' THEN 'Cutting, ' ELSE '' END ||
                CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.is_ligature, 'N') = 'Y' THEN 'Strangulation or hanging, ' ELSE '' END ||
                CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.is_burning, 'N') = 'Y' THEN 'Burning, ' ELSE '' END
            , ',\\s*$', ''), '')
        WHEN ctf.code = 'FIND' THEN
            NULLIF(REGEXP_REPLACE(
                CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.f6m_alcohol, 0) = 1 OR COALESCE(qa.found_alcohol, 0) = 1 THEN 'Alcohol, ' ELSE '' END ||
                CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.f6m_drugs, 0) = 1 OR COALESCE(qa.found_drug, 0) = 1 THEN 'Drugs, ' ELSE '' END ||
                CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.f6m_mobile, 0) = 1 OR COALESCE(qa.found_mobile, 0) = 1 THEN 'Mobile phone, ' ELSE '' END ||
                CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.f6m_sim, 0) = 1 THEN 'SIM card, ' ELSE '' END ||
                CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.f6m_memory, 0) = 1 THEN 'Memory card, ' ELSE '' END ||
                CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.f6m_digital, 0) = 1 THEN 'Digital, ' ELSE '' END ||
                CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.f6m_tobacco, 0) = 1 THEN 'Tobacco, ' ELSE '' END ||
                CASE WHEN COALESCE(qa.f6m_weapon, 0) = 1 THEN 'Weapon, ' ELSE '' END
            , ',\\s*$', ''), '')
    END AS incident_summary

FROM prisons.incidentreporting_prisoner_involvement pi
         JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_report r ON r.id = pi.report_id
         JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_constant_status cs ON r.status = cs.code
         JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type ct ON r.type = ct.code
         JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type_family ctf ON ctf.code = ct.family_code
         JOIN prisons.incidentreporting_constant_prisoner_role cpr ON cpr.code = pi.prisoner_role
         JOIN prisons.prisonregister_prison p ON p.prison_id = r.location
         LEFT JOIN qa_pivoted qa ON qa.report_id = r.id

WHERE r.status NOT IN ('DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE', 'DRAFT')

report.name: Prisoner summary of incidents
report.description: Count of incidents per prisoner for self harm, assaults and others

report.name: Prisoner Involvement in Incidents: Establishment Level
report.description: Shows each prisoner involved in a reported incident alongside their role, any comments recorded against them, and where the incident took place. For key incident types, structured Q&A detail is surfaced as additional columns: assault severity (a derived serious-assault classification per the serious/sexual assault rules, plus sexual, spitting, concussion treatment, hospital admission and reason); weapon type for assault, disorder and escape/attempted-escape incidents; self-harm method flags (cutting, strangulation/hanging, burning); and for finds, a comma-separated list of items identified.
